texto: I'm a cat. You know cat's don't like to go outside. They actually drop their smell all over a place, and that becomes their place. So when you live with a cat, you actually live at the cat's house.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Carla Bruni-Sarkozy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I'm a cat. You know cat's don't like to go outside. They actually drop their smell all over a pla…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, cats, actually pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor.
